notes: v1.14.84 - Redesign Step 2 (re-home Reference, Know first): the Reference page (pg-ref) gains its 5-tab strip (Optics/Hardware/CLI-IB/HW Ref/Know; the first four are stubs until their own steps). The operational-knowledge content (Runbook subtab = change-mgmt, escalation tree, shift start/handover, severity P1-P4, ESD) is re-homed from pg-power into Reference->Know by re-parenting the live #pw-rb node at boot (redesign_homeKnow) - markup, handlers and the responsive grid stay byte-identical (re-home, don't rebuild). Re-home is FLAG-GATED: with ?redesign=1, pw-rb moves to Reference->Know and runbook search hits route there (showRefTab); with the flag off (field default), pw-rb stays in pg-power and every original route - Power->Runbook button, runbook search landing on Power, pwr-sub group - is byte-for-byte untouched. Both routes coexist across the flag boundary (re-home governance s1.2). Nothing else re-homed.
